# CallCatcher Ops

> Done-for-you Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) for local businesses.

## Canonical
- https://callcatcherops.com/callcatcherops/

## Key Pages
- https://callcatcherops.com/callcatcherops/
- https://callcatcherops.com/callcatcherops/intake.html
- https://callcatcherops.com/callcatcherops/thanks.html
- https://callcatcherops.com/callcatcherops/workflow-subscription.html
- https://callcatcherops.com/callcatcherops/aeo-faq.html
- https://callcatcherops.com/unsubscribe.html

## Service Definition
CallCatcher Ops provides autonomous AEO execution for small and local businesses. The service includes buyer-question content architecture, schema implementation, authority signal alignment, and recurring optimization for AI recommendation visibility.

## Ideal Customers
- Local service businesses
- Multi-location service operators
- Teams that want outsourced AI visibility execution
- Founders prioritizing execution over manual growth ops

## Outcomes
- Increased AI-readable coverage for high-intent questions
- Better citation eligibility in AI answer engines
- Stronger consistency across authority signals and profiles
- Weekly evidence of shipped work and iteration priorities

## Operating Model
- One onboarding form
- Async approvals only when legally required
- Weekly implementation cadence
- Transparent reporting cadence

- Onboarding: https://callcatcherops.com/callcatcherops/intake.html

- Plan details: https://callcatcherops.com/callcatcherops/workflow-subscription.html
